name: Superb Cash Advance
description_short: At 3111 W 117th St in Cleveland, OH, Superb Cash Advance specializes in fast personal loans with same-day approval.
description_long:
Superb Cash Advance is located at 3111 W 117th St, Suite E, on Cleveland's West Side. The branch sits in a convenient standalone location with easy access and nearby residential areas. Hours are Monday through Friday from 8:30 AM to 8:30 PM, Saturday and Sunday from 9:30 AM to 6:30 PM.

This Cleveland location specializes in personal loans and cash advances, serving the immediate community around W 117th St. The staff can help you understand your options and complete applications quickly. For questions or to discuss your financial needs, call 216-714-1435 to speak with a loan specialist.

If you're in Cleveland, OH and need fast cash with minimal wait, bring a valid ID, proof of income, and a current utility bill or bank statement. Superb Cash Advance focuses on quick approvals and transparent terms—understanding rates and repayment upfront.
address: 3111 W 117th St suite e, Cleveland, OH 44111

company_info.headquarters: 3111 W 117th St suite e, Cleveland, OH 44111

pros: Same-day loan approval and funding available for qualified applicants
Accepts all credit types with no traditional credit check requirement
Loan amounts up to $5,000 available online and up to $50,000 for bad credit loans
Minimal documentation required for application process
Flexible payment schedules and installment loan options available
Physical in-person location with staff assistance in Atlanta
cons: No APR, interest rates, or fee information disclosed on website
Typical payday loan products often carry triple-digit APRs that trap borrowers in debt cycles
Unsecured short-term loans create high default risk and expensive renewal cycles
Customer reviews reference Arvada location not mentioned in Atlanta profile, suggesting inconsistent franchising
No information about state compliance, licensing, or regulatory disclosures required by Georgia lending laws
best_for: Consumers needing $100-$1,000 for immediate expenses and unable to access traditional bank loans
Individuals with poor credit history or no credit file seeking fast emergency funding
Those who prefer in-person loan processing with staff guidance over online-only applications
diagnosis: Superb Cash Advance is best for consumers facing immediate cash emergencies who cannot qualify for traditional bank loans and have limited alternative options. The primary caveat is the absence of transparent pricing disclosures—typical payday loans carry APRs of 300-500% or higher, creating significant debt risk; consumers must request full terms in writing before committing and should explore alternatives like credit union PALs or employer advances first.
services: Unsecured personal loans for all credit types
Installment loans with flexible payment schedules
Quick approval loans with minimal documentation
In-person loan processing at physical location
Second lien title loans (mentioned in customer review)
meta_description: Superb Cash Advance at 3111 W 117th St, Cleveland, OH. Same-day personal loans. Fast approval.
